summary: VOLAURA assessment engine psychometric soundness needs validation. Five areas of concern: IRT 3PL parameters, question pool size, DIF analysis, CAT stopping rules, and temporal decay rationale. Review of apps/api/app/core/assessment/engine.py is required.
gaps_in_current_canon: IRT 3PL parameters may be guessed, not calibrated from real data. Question pool size per competency may be less than 15, affecting differentiation and reliability.
proposed_action: Review engine.py, calibrate IRT 3PL parameters from real data, ensure question pool size meets minimum requirements, conduct DIF analysis, and evaluate CAT stopping rules and temporal decay rationale.
